calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-10-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2009 Continued To Nov-10-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Philip T. Kilduff, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to 11/10/2009 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Diana Padilla, CSR 975. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-29-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-29-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-08-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES:
This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner William Gargano, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert CSR: L. Jones.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff Chase Bank with Cheri L. Gorman of Chase Card Services.
Atty. Michael Heath appearing for the defendant James Mcnamara also present in court.
The parties reached a settlement which was recited on the record.
Judgement will be entered in favor of the Plaintiff Chase Bank and against the Defendant in the Principal amount of $ 37,369.83. Payments will be made in installment. Notice will be sent by the court to put this matter in the CRC CALENDAR. Ms. Macdonald to prepare and deliver the Judgment to Dept. 218 by the close of business day of July 6, 2009.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2009 Set For Trial On Jun-29-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
